# Beacon

> HTTP Monitoring for .NET

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](_llms/getting-started/index.md): Install Beacon and create your first monitor
- [Installation](_llms/getting-started/install.md): Detailed installation instructions

## Guides

- [Configuration](_llms/guides/configuration.md): Configure monitors, alerts, and persistence
- [Migrating from v2 to v3](_llms/guides/migration-v3.md): Step-by-step guide to upgrading your monitoring
- [Pipeline Configuration](_llms/guides/pipeline-config.md): Configure monitoring pipelines

## Api

- [API Reference](_llms/api/index.md): Core types and extension methods

## Changelog

- [v3.2.0](_llms/changelog/v3-2.md): Beacon v3.2 release notes
